headline: Newmont’s Red Chris Block Cave Project Receives Major Regulatory Approvals
summary: DENVER, June 19, 2026--Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) ("Newmont") welcomes the Province of British Columbia’s approval of key regulatory authorizations for the Red Chris Block Cave project. The approvals enable the transition of the Red Chris Mine from current open-pit operations to block caving, allowing an extension of mine life into the mid-2040s. They mark a significant milestone in stage-gating as Newmont advances toward a final investment decision (FID) later this yea

headline: Red Chris Mine Receives Major Regulatory Authorizations for Block Cave Project
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, June 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Imperial Metals Corporation (“Imperial”) (TSX:III) is pleased to report that the Province of British Columbia has granted key authorizations approving the transition of Red Chris from open pit operations to a block cave mine.
